name: Wescare Transportation LLC
districts_or_customers: Niagara Falls / Western NY NEMT clients
recent_news: Owner Wesley Streeter pursued a NY cannabis dispensary license through WesCare Transportation (Crain's 2023-2024), suggesting diversification interests beyond core transport.
fit_notes: Very small NEMT/ambulette operator, not a yellow-school-bus contractor; owner is focused on cannabis venture. Poor fit for Summit's school-bus tuck-in thesis.

name: Med First Inc
districts_or_customers: New Bedford MA area NEMT / livery clients
recent_news: Renewed New Bedford Private Livery License in recent city council agendas; long-standing local NEMT/ambulance operator.
fit_notes: Tiny New Bedford livery/ambulance shop, not a yellow-bus contractor. Outside Summit's school-bus M&A focus.

name: Florida Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Orlando/Tampa/Daytona group & tourist charters; not a school district contractor
recent_news: Operates as Florida Bus Service / floridabusservice.com providing nationwide-authorized charter motorcoach services across Florida; markets itself explicitly as an alternative to traditional school buses, not as a yellow-bus operator.
fit_notes: Charter/motorcoach broker-operator, NOT a school-bus contractor despite 'school' flag in the source data. Does not fit Summit's tuck-in profile.

name: A J Myers & Sons Bus Co Inc
recent_news: Third-generation family-owned operator now in its 75th+ year (per company site); historically ranked among School Bus Fleet Top 50 with ~450 buses; remains independent and family-run in 2025-2026.
fit_notes: EXCELLENT Summit tuck-in target: ~400-bus, 3rd-gen family-owned Western PA contractor with deep district roster including Pittsburgh Public, Bethel Park, Butler. Multi-generational ownership = strong succession angle; one of the larger independents in PA. NOTE: source data lists revenue at $792K/3 employees — clearly stale/erroneous given ~400 buses and multi-district contracts.

name: Jenkins School Buses
principals: Jenkins family (Donald 'Zeke' and Lisa M. Jenkins historically)
districts_or_customers: Troy Area School District (Bradford/Tioga County PA)
recent_news: Active FMCSA carrier since Aug 1997 (DOT# 703048) out of 553 Bronson Rd, Troy PA; ~13 power units / 9 drivers. Founding co-owner Lisa M. Jenkins passed in 1999 per Tri-County obituary archive; business continued under family.
fit_notes: Small ~13-bus rural Northern PA family contractor serving Troy/Athens/Northern Tioga districts. Long history and likely aging ownership = real succession angle, but very small scale; modest tuck-in for Summit's PA cluster.
